metadata.description: Personal Claude Code plugins using cursor-agent

plugins.name: consultant
plugins.description: Multi-model AI consultation using cursor-agent. Supports consultation, research, and deliberation modes.

plugins.name: skill-utils
plugins.description: Utilities for creating and validating Claude Code skills. Scaffolds new skills for plugins or repositories.

plugins.name: history-analyser
plugins.description: Search and summarise Claude Code conversation history. Find past discussions and generate work summaries.

plugins.name: workflow-tools
plugins.description: Code review, cleanup, comment deslopping, refactoring, debugging discipline, browser testing agent, and gate-keeper evaluation agent. PEP workflow moved to its own marketplace at the pep repo.

plugins.name: cursor-sync
plugins.description: Syncs Claude Code plugins to Cursor skills and commands directories with launchd watcher.

plugins.name: commit-commands
plugins.description: Git commit workflow commands: commit, push and PR, branch cleanup.

plugins.name: d2-diagrams
plugins.description: Generate professional architecture and flow diagrams using D2 with C4 model conventions. Includes style guide, judge loop for quality iteration, and layout best practices.

plugins.name: pep
plugins.description: PEP workflow: markdown-driven planning, investigation, and execution. Wave shapes, adversarial review, evidence-required gates. Folds in the spike (investigation) flow. Audit hook records what actually ran. Includes the grill skill (alignment interview + domain glossary) as the planning front door.

plugins.name: logo-pipeline
plugins.description: Logo design generation pipeline using Gemini image generation. Generates prompt variations, calls API, evaluates results, iterates, and produces brand kits.

plugins.name: memory
plugins.description: Persistent session memory: auto-checkpoints sessions (PreCompact/SessionEnd), /note-session writes daily logs, /rollup-day distills them, /recall searches the curated layer. No external deps.

plugins.name: curator
plugins.description: Background skill-library maintenance. Weekly idle-gated pass that consolidates near-duplicate skills into umbrella skills with references/templates/scripts subfiles. Pre-run snapshots, rollback, pin. Ported from Hermes.

plugins.name: auto-improve
plugins.description: Background review hook that learns from each session. Interval-gated per-turn reviews with frustration/save-this overrides, ported from Hermes agent's self-improvement loop.

plugins.name: qa
plugins.description: QA spine. qa-scenarios generates user-impact test scenarios from a code change, reading a layered repo-local QA.md failure-mode corpus discovered at runtime. Product-agnostic; grows the corpus as the user reacts to scenarios.
